spec.name: A Shadowy Path Through The Dense Forest
spec.description: You are on a small shadowy path leading through the dense forest. The crowns of the old trees leave the forest in an unreal twilight illumination. The path continues north and south.

north.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

south.description: The path winds its way into darkness.

extra_descs.description: The shadowy path is probably used by the animals living in the forest.
The trees are mostly old beeches and oaks.
